name: Asparagus with Black Bean Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp baking soda, dissolved in 2 teaspoons water
1 tbsp Chinese fermented black beans, minced with:
recipeInstructions:
---------------------MARINADE FOR BEEF---------------------
1 tablespoon cornstarch
1 tablespoon soy sauce
1/2 teaspoon rice wine
1/2 teaspoon sugar
1/4 teaspoon MSG (optional)
1/2 teaspoon salt
-----------------------GRAVY MIXTURE-----------------------
1 tablespoon cornstarch
1/3 cup water
1. Cut the beef when it is partially frozen, and cut across the grain into thin slices.
2. Stir baking soda solution into the beef (to help tenderize it). Stir in the marinade. Then stir in 1 teaspoon peanut oil and marinate the beef for one hour or more in the refrigerator.
3. Heat 1 tablespoon peanut oil over high heat. Add 1/4 teaspoon salt. Stir in asparagus. Add 2 teaspoons water.
4. Cover pan and cook until done, about 2 minutes. Do not lift lid. Remove to a platter.
5. Over high heat, add 1 tablespoon of oil. Stir-fry the RINSED black beans and garlic mixture. Stir for a few seconds.
6. Add the beef. Stir-fry quickly until barely cooked through. Sizzle in 1 tablespoon rice wine and 2 teaspoons soy sauce.
7. Stir in asparagus.
8. Add gravy mixture. Stir until thickened. Serve hot.
